mapper.sql: SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_WRITER , COUNT , TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createDate , CHANGE_NAME
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
FROM BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: , BOARD_CONTENT , ORIGIN_NAME FROM BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}

select count(*) from board where status = 'Y'
and board_content
and board_writer
and board_title
like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

from board where status = 'Y'
and board_content
and board_writer
and board_title
like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by board_no desc
